zh.lifeSummary: Thomas Ford於大約1591年出生在英國英格蘭多瑟特多爾斯特。他於1616年6月19日與Elizabeth Charde在英國多瑟特布利波特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1676年11月9日在美國麻薩諸塞州哈普爾諾薩普頓享年86歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州哈普爾諾薩普頓布里奇 史崔特 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Thomas Ford于大约1591年出生在英国英格兰多瑟特多爾斯特。他于1616年6月19日与Elizabeth Charde在英国多瑟特布利波特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1676年11月9日在美国马萨诸塞州哈普爾諾薩普頓享年86岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州哈普爾諾薩普頓布里奇 史崔特 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Ford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived near a ford (Middle English, Old English ford), or a habitational name from one of the many places called with this word, such as Ford (Durham, Herefordshire, Northumberland, Shropshire, Sussex), Ford in Sefton (Lancashire), Ford in Crediton and Ford in Holcombe Rogus (both Devon), Ford in Litton and Ford in Wiveliscombe (both Somerset).

Irish: Anglicized form (quasi-translation) of various Gaelic names, for example MacGiolla na Naomh ‘son of Gilla na Naomh’ (a personal name meaning ‘servant of the saints’), Mac Conshámha ‘son of Conshnámha’ (a personal name composed of the elements con ‘dog’ + snámh ‘to swim’), in all of which the final syllable was wrongly thought to be áth ‘ford’, and Ó Fuar(th)áin (see Foran ).

variants.name: Forth
meanings: German: topographic name for someone who lived by a ford, Middle High German vort, vurt, Middle Low German vorde ‘ford, entrance way’, or a habitational name from a place in Franconia or in former Pomerania (now Poland) named Forth.

variants.name: Forde
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Declan, Dermot, Aine, Fionnuala, Liam, Nuala.
English and Irish: variant of   Ford   1 and 2. This is a very common spelling in Ireland.
Norwegian (Førde): habitational name from any of numerous farmsteads named Førde (there are eleven on the west coast), from Old Norse fyrthi, dative of fjǫrthr ‘fjord’.

variants.name: Foran
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Fuartháin ‘descendant of Fuarthán’, a personal name derived from fuar ‘cold’. The word fuarán also means ‘spring’ or ‘pool’. The form Fuarthán was understood as fuarathán ‘cold little ford’, and the name has thus sometimes been translated into English as Ford .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.description: Oldest grave seen in the memorial list

Bridge Street Cemetery is located at 156 Bridge Street (Route 9) in Northampton next Lampron Park and the Bridge Street Elementary School.  Established in 1661, it is the oldest cemetery in Northampton.  The City of Northampton oversees the cemetery.

en.lifeSummary: Thomas Ford was born about 1591, in Dorchester, Dorset, England, United Kingdom. He married Elizabeth Charde on 19 June 1616, in Bridport, Dorset, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died on 9 November 1676, in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts, United States, at the age of 86, and was buried in Bridge Street Cemetery, Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts, United States.

Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Fordは約1591年にイギリスイギリスドールセトドールチェスターで生まれた。1616年6月19日にイギリスドールセトブリドプオルトでElizabeth Chardeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1676年11月9日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ハンプシュアイアノーサンプトンで86歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ハンプシュアイアノーサンプトンブリッジ ストレエト セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Ford(은)는 대략 1591년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 도르체스터에서 태어났다. 그는 1616년 6월 19일 영국 도르세트 브리드포트에서 Elizabeth Charde(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1676년 11월 9일 미국 매사추세츠 주 함프실르 노르섬프턴에서 86세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 함프실르 노르섬프턴 브리지 스트릿 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Thomas Ford nasceu aproximadamente 1591, em Dorchester, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Charde em 19 de junho de 1616, em Bridport, Dorset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de novembro de 1676, em Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América, com 86 anos, e foi sepultado em Bridge Street Cemetery, Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Ba: нортамптон, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Thomas Ford родился около 1591 г. в местности дорчестир, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Charde 19 июня 1616 г. в местности бридпорт, дорсет, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер 9 ноября 1676 г. в местности нортамптон, хампшир, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 86 лет и был похоронен в местности бридж стрит кеметири, нортамптон, хампшир, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Thomas Ford nació aproximadamente 1591, en Dorchester, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con Elizabeth Charde el 19 de junio de 1616, en Bridport, Dorset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió el 9 de noviembre de 1676, en Northampton, Hampshire, Masachusets, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 86 años, y fue sepultado en Bridge Street Cemetery, Northampton, Hampshire, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
